info: Indicators associated with a phishing threat leveraging Facebook business partner collaboration tools
Google Sites lure URL embedded into the partner-request email text.
Early phishing landing page posing as a Meta Agency Partner Program page.
Earlier exfiltration domain used to receive stolen victim data.
Cloudflare-hosted, attacker-controlled domain used to frame Netlify phishing pages.
Netlify-hosted phishing page used for the content-monetization variant.
Facebook Messenger chat used by phishing bot
